goal: 修复插件图标点击不打开侧边栏

summary.title: 修复插件图标侧边栏入口
summary.what: 给 MV3 manifest 增加 sidePanel 权限；background 启动时启用 chrome.sidePanel.setPanelBehavior({ openPanelOnActionClick: true })，并保留 chrome.action.onClicked + sidePanel.open fallback；补测试覆盖 manifest 权限和扩展图标点击会打开 side panel。
summary.why: 用户手工加载 unpacked extension 后点击插件图标没有反应。自动 release smoke 直接打开 sidepanel 页面并走 runtime message，没有覆盖真实工具栏 action click 入口。
summary.user_goal: 修复插件图标点击不打开侧边栏

decisions.chose: 使用 Chrome sidePanel.setPanelBehavior({ openPanelOnActionClick: true }) 作为主路径
decisions.rationale: 这是 MV3 side panel 对工具栏 action click 的直接 wiring，能让手工点击扩展图标打开同一个 sidepanel.html。

decisions.chose: 在 setPanelBehavior 不可用时注册 action.onClicked 并调用 sidePanel.open
decisions.rationale: 保持手工入口在不同 Chrome sidePanel API 形态下仍有可用路径。

review_notes: 验证已跑 targeted manifest test：side panel / offscreen-ready 相关 2 tests passed。
验证已跑 focused biome、bun run build、bun run check；仓库 gate 39 files / 626 tests passed。
验证已跑 bun run release:smoke:mv3，真实 Chromium MV3 release smoke ok。

architectural_claims: Manual extension action click is part of the MV3 cutover surface and must be tested separately from direct sidepanel page navigation.
behavioral_changes: Clicking the Browser Brain Loop Next toolbar action opens the configured side panel.
The extension manifest declares the sidePanel permission.
The background bridge startup wires the action click side panel behavior without changing runtime message routing.
security_implications: Adds the Chrome sidePanel extension permission so the extension can use the side panel API for the toolbar action entrypoint.
migration_notes: Existing unpacked installs should be reloaded from chrome://extensions after rebuilding dist so Chrome picks up the new sidePanel permission and background script.
